title: Pat-a-Cake Classic
instruction: Clap your hands together with your baby, gently guiding their hands to meet yours on the beat.

title: Slow Clap
instruction: Take it slow. Clap once per beat, letting your baby anticipate each clap.

title: Bounce & Clap
instruction: Alternate between bouncing your baby and clapping together. Switch every 4 beats.

title: Listen & Move
instruction: Play the beat and let your baby move freely. Mirror their movements when you can.

title: Quick Hands
instruction: Speed up the clapping! Keep it fun and silly. It's OK if baby can't keep up.
